summary: Completed comprehensive testing of FAQ Chat popup functionality in student dashboard. All core features are working correctly including login, popup opening, 6 categories display, question/answer interaction, and search functionality.

ui_bugs.issue: Popup still shows as visible after clicking close button (X)
ui_bugs.description: The popup close animation may not be fully completing or visibility state not properly updated

passed_tests: FAQ Chat button visible in bottom right corner
FAQ popup opens when clicking toggle button
6 popular categories displayed correctly (treino, saude, nutricao, financeiro, app, outros)
Category click shows list of questions (8 questions found in first category)
Question click displays answer in chat conversation
Search input field functional and accepts text input
Chat conversation flow with user questions and bot answers
Proper greeting message when opening FAQ chat
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: FAQ popup close functionality should properly hide the popup when X button is clicked. Consider checking CSS transitions and visibility state management in FAQChatPopup component.
